bead.title: progress: quarantine legacy formatter only if deletion is deferred
bead.description:
PROBLEM
This bead overlaps with the deletion beads unless it is explicitly treated as a fallback quarantine. If ddx-f948b7a4 deletes the legacy formatter/tailer first, there is nothing left to isolate.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go may still contain legacy normalization while ddx-b20bdc55 introduces canonical SD-011 progress consumption.
- ddx-f948b7a4 is the preferred cleanup path and should remove the production formatter/tailer entirely.

PROPOSED FIX
Run this only if deletion is deferred or incomplete. Quarantine any remaining legacy normalization behind an explicitly named fallback-only path that is unreachable from capture-time Claude/Codex/native wrappers. If ddx-f948b7a4 removes the formatter/tailer production code, close this bead as superseded.

NON-SCOPE
- Reintroducing production dependence on Fizeau session-log parsing.
- Fizeau schema changes.
bead.acceptance:
1. If rg -n 'FormatSessionLogLines|TailSessionLogs|readActiveSessionLog' cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server has no production hits after ddx-f948b7a4, close this bead as superseded with no code changes.
2. If legacy normalization remains, canonical SD-011 progress formatting is implemented separately from legacy normalization.
3. No capture-time Claude/Codex/native wrapper calls formatter-layer helpers such as output-summary/excerpt functions.
4. Legacy normalization, if retained, is explicitly fallback-only for historical logs and maps turn/round fields into canonical turn_index.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run "TestFormatSessionLogLines|Test.*Progress|Test.*Legacy" -count=1 passes if any legacy formatter remains.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
